top_signals.title: Japanese officials open X accounts to counter China’s cognitive warfare
top_signals.summary: In light of Russia's invasion of Ukraine, the SDF recognizes the importance of addressing cognitive warfare, which is conducted through disinformation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: American Airlines CEO lays out his vision to close a more than $3 billion profit gap
top_signals.summary: The carrier is working on improving reliability, investing in more premium seats and lounges, and considering Boeing and Airbus for a new wide-body plane order.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Housing costs is the top political issue for young voters, CNBC survey finds
top_signals.summary: The cost of housing is the top priority for voters ages 18 to 34, besting food and healthcare cost concerns, the CNBC All-America Economic Survey found.

top_signals.title: Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin on two sports businesses his multibillion-dollar conglomerate won't enter
top_signals.summary: Fanatics has become one of the most influential companies in sports, building out a massive merchandise, collectibles and sports gambling platform.
